instruction: Help me organize the team introduction into the work summary

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Team Introduction
Team Name: Smart Product R&D Center
Team Size: 28 members
Core Members: 3 Product Managers, 6 Frontend Engineers, 8 Backend Engineers, 5 Algorithm Engineers, 4 QA Engineers, 2 Designers
Established: June 2022
Key Achievements: Launched 120+ product features, user satisfaction 92%' > /home/user/Desktop/team_intro.txt

phases.instruction: Help me organize the team introduction into the work summary

Extract the team size information from /home/user/Desktop/team_intro.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/work_summary.txt: 'Team Size: 28 members, core members covering product, development, design, and QA', save

include: Team Size: 28 members, core members covering product, development, design, and QA
